name: barbarian-days-a-surfing-life
description: William Finnegan's 'Barbarian Days: A Surfing Life' — the Pulitzer Prize-winning memoir of a life spent chasing waves around the world. From Hawaii to South Africa, from Fiji to Indonesia, Finnegan weaves together his surfing obsession with his development as a writer and a citizen of the world. A masterful exploration of what it means to devote your life to something beautiful, dangerous, and utterly absorbing.
